prestazioni: Engine: M273 E50 (5.0L V8) – Forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (86mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system from Wagner Tuning, paired with a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors for a target of 650whp on 93 octane fuel.

Drivetrain: Upgraded 7G-Tronic transmission reinforcement via a Level 10 Motorsports valve body and torque converter (3,500 RPM stall), coupled with a Quaife ATB differential (40% lock) and custom 300M axles from Driveshaft Shop to handle increased torque loads.

Suspension: Full Öhlins Road & Track coilover kit (part #DFV 22M001) with adjustable camber plates and custom-valved dampers for the R-Class unibody, paired with H&R Sport sway bars (25mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (part #4.5111G) for reduced compliance.
estetica: Widebody conversion using the R-Class-specific Rocket Bunny V2 kit (Pandem Design), featuring carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler with integrated brake ducts, all finished in Satin Silver with exposed carbon weave accents.

Front bumper replacement with the AMG R63-style lip (part #A2518800600) modified for a 3D-printed carbon fiber splitter from 996 Motorsports, paired with a custom titanium bolt-on tow hook from Billetworkz for track-day functionality.

Wheel setup: Forged BBS LM-R II (9.5x20 ET25 front, 11x20 ET35 rear) with custom center caps featuring the Mercedes-Benz Motorsport logo, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/20 front, 315/25/20 rear) and paired with AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers (part #CP8650-2000K) with 380mm two-piece rotors for aggressive brake cooling.
